name: mayday-create
description: Plugin development platform for Adobe Premiere Pro 2026

scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:server && npm run build:cli && npm run build:cep && npm run build:sync-engine
scripts.install:launcher: npm run package:launcher && cp -R 'packages/launcher/release/mac-arm64/Mayday Create.app' /Applications/ && echo 'Installed to /Applications'
